built_recently: Improved hero relevance — again. The Prob was surfacing League of Legends esports matches as the lead market while Rory McIlroy's Masters surge and Iran diplomacy swings sat below the fold. Two fixes shipped: esports markets are now fully excluded from hero eligibility, and genuinely dominant stories (big volume + big move) can no longer be buried by the repeat penalty. Today's hero: Rory McIlroy to win The Masters, 46-point swing, $1.9M market. That's the front page.
coming_next: Pressure-testing The Spread (Polymarket vs. Kalshi price gaps, our best arbitrage signal). Also shipping Yesterday's Biggest Swings and a Closing Soon rail for markets resolving within 72 hours near 50/50. Test 1 of the paper trading experiment just wrapped. Results incoming.
